source_path: 0. Foundation and pre-product stabilization and codebase setup/0.1 — Monorepo bootstrap.json
title: Version 0.1 — Monorepo bootstrap
summary: See **Service task slices** under each `0.1.P` patch file and [`docs/codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md`](../codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md).
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["0.1.x Monorepo bootstrap"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    start["uvicorn / Mangum entry"] --> mw["Middleware: CORS Host DBCommit RequestId Trace Timing"]
    mw --> gql["GraphQL router /graphql"]
    gql --> ctx["get_context: JWT decode optional"]
    ctx --> db["AsyncSession get_db commit/rollback"]
    db --> health["GET /health /health/db ..."]
    health --> gate["0.1 release gate smoke"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands (typical):** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` scaffold · `.3`–`.5` hardening · `.6`–`.8` integration/drift · `.9` minor freeze / handoff to `0.(N+1).0`.
Theme: **Forge**. Per-patch **Micro-gate** + **Service task slices** live in each linked patch file below.
